content: Just as 2024–2025 cutting-edge active learning agent memory systems rely on curiosity-driven pruning and prioritization of high-information episodic memory to avoid saturation and improve long-task performance, general-purpose autonomous agents can evolve their core behavioral schema by actively retaining only high-uncertainty, high-outcome interaction memories instead of fixing their objective functions at initialization. This creates a self-amplifying loop where the agent’s memory architecture shapes its goals, rather than the other way around.
